form.formComment: Five-year-old mare by Trixton out of Cuzco on debut. Won a trial on March 19 at Shepparton over 2190m. Expected to run well from an inside draw.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Five-year-old mare by Trixton out of Cuzco on debut. Won a trial on March 19 at Shepparton over 2190m. Expected to run well from an inside draw.

form.formComment: Two back was beaten by 9 m finishing second behind Coltrane at Ballarat over 1710m in a MAIDEN on March 19 at $21. Then a handy effort when beaten by 3.5 m finishing third behind Beau Truscott at Kilmore over 1690m in a MAIDEN on March 26 at $7. Among the top chances again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Two back was beaten by 9 m finishing second behind Coltrane at Ballarat over 1710m in a MAIDEN on March 19 at $21. Then a handy effort when beaten by 3.5 m finishing third behind Beau Truscott at Kilmore over 1690m in a MAIDEN on March 26 at $7. Among the top chances again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up for clear running during the early stages of the run to the finish.

form.formComment: Three-year-old colt by Aldebaran Eagle out of Mason Magic having his first start. Finished second in a trial on March 16 at Bendigo over 2150m. Keep very safe.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Three-year-old colt by Aldebaran Eagle out of Mason Magic having his first start. Finished second in a trial on March 16 at Bendigo over 2150m. Keep very safe.

form.formComment: Resumes today. At the latest first-up run 6th (Fr3) over 2180m at Kilmore, beaten 40 m by Giggle Water (2:52.10) in 3yo MAIDEN on August 28 at $15. Has been in work for a little while but after a lengthy break may need the run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Resumes today. At the latest first-up run 6th (Fr3) over 2180m at Kilmore, beaten 40 m by Giggle Water (2:52.10) in 3yo MAIDEN on August 28 at $15. Has been in work for a little while but after a lengthy break may need the run.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Weakened over the final staged to finish in 7th position, beaten 98.8m.

form.formComment: Having her second run back from a spell. Game effort when 2nd (Fr5) over 2190m at this track was 3rd-4.06 at the bell, beaten 4.5 m by Bet Bet Hotshot (2:52.80) in MAIDEN on March 24 at $4.40. Winning claims with added fitness.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Weakened over the final stages to finish in 5th position, beaten 61.2m.

form.formComment: Three-year-old filly by Classic Connection out of My Valerie on debut. Finished fourth at Shepparton in a trial on March 19 over 1690m. Will be better for the run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Three-year-old filly by Classic Connection out of My Valerie on debut. Finished fourth at Shepparton in a trial on March 19 over 1690m. Will be better for the run.

form.formComment: Last start 8th (Sr4) over 1650m at Bendigo, at the bell was 9th-12.36 beaten 13 m by Sonnyboy (2:04.20) in NR 37 to 41 on April 8 at $101. Two runs back 6th (Sr4) over 2150m at Bendigo, beaten 30 m by Butlers Wharf (2:45.20) in 4yo+ MAIDEN on March 18 at $17. Will need some luck to figure.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Broke gait shortly after the start.

form.formComment: First up. At the last run she was well back in the run when 9th (Fr5) over 2190m at this track well beaten by Pastor Dunbar (2:47.60) in MAIDEN on December 2 at $4.40. Sure to go well while fresh.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: First up. At the last run she was well back in the run when 9th (Fr5) over 2190m at this track well beaten by Pastor Dunbar (2:47.60) in MAIDEN on December 2 at $4.40. Sure to go well while fresh.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Broke gait free of interference approaching the 200m mark.

form.formComment: Last start was fifth behind Bet Bet Hotshot at this track over 2190m in a MAIDEN on March 24 at $1.80. Raced better the start before that with a good run when 2nd (Sr2) over 2150m at Bendigo was leading by 2.73 at the bell, beaten 7 m by Butlers Wharf (2:45.20) in 4yo+ MAIDEN on March 18 at $6.50. Very hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start was fifth behind Bet Bet Hotshot at this track over 2190m in a MAIDEN on March 24 at $1.80. Raced better the start before that with a good run when 2nd (Sr2) over 2150m at Bendigo was leading by 2.73 at the bell, beaten 7 m by Butlers Wharf (2:45.20) in 4yo+ MAIDEN on March 18 at $6.50. Very hard to beat.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Inconvenienced approaching the first turn by Twotter Tay.

form.formComment: Began his campaign last start running 11th (Sr3) over 1690m at Kilmore well beaten by Beau Truscott (2:11.00) in MAIDEN on March 26 at $21. This looks out of his reach.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Began his campaign last start running 11th (Sr3) over 1690m at Kilmore well beaten by Beau Truscott (2:11.00) in MAIDEN on March 26 at $21. This looks out of his reach.

Pulled hard in the score up, then galloped after the start.

form.formComment: First up. At the last run she took no part at Gunbower (MAIDEN) on December 14 over 2030m. Will be hard to beat despite the layoff.

form.formComment: Last start was well beaten after breaking at Echuca on April 5. Two runs back 8th (Fr2) over 1650m after showing early speed at Bendigo beaten 55 m by Calabasas (2:04.10) in MAIDEN M on March 25 at $16. Not keen on her chances in this line-up.
